requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 as Donor-Expected Baseline for Sierra Leone BESS Project Acceptance; SLSB Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619和IEC 62133作为捐助方对塞拉利昂BESS项目验收的预期基准；SLSB合格评定
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619和IEC 62133作為捐助方對獅子山BESS項目驗收的預期基準；SLSB合格評定

summary.en: The Sierra Leone Standards Bureau (SLSB), established under the Sierra Leone Standards Bureau Act 1962 and reformed under subsequent legislation, is the national body responsible for developing and adopting standards in Sierra Leone. SLSB has a mandate to adopt international standards — including IEC standards — as Sierra Leone national standards. However, a publicly confirmed, BESS-specific mandatory pre-market product safety certification obligation administered by SLSB — analogous to Saudi Arabia's SABER/IEC 62619 route or the EU Battery Regulation — has not been identified as of the dataset date. In practice, BESS deployed in Sierra Leone is overwhelmingly donor-financed (World Bank Energy Sector Utility Reform Project, AfDB, UNOPS/FCDO mini-grid programmes, and similar). Donor and multilateral lender procurement specifications are the operative technical gate: they typically require IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) and IEC 62133-2 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells) type-test certificates from ILAC-accredited laboratories for cells and modules, plus IEC 62933-5-2 evidence for the battery system. SLSB conformity assessment requirements for imported BESS cells and modules should be verified directly with SLSB before shipment, as Sierra Leone may require conformity certificates under SLSB's import inspection scheme for specified product categories.
summary.zh: 塞拉利昂标准局（SLSB）依据《1962年塞拉利昂标准局法》及后续立法改革设立，是负责制定和采纳标准的国家机构。SLSB有权将国际标准（包括IEC标准）采纳为塞拉利昂国家标准。然而，截至本数据集日期，尚未发现SLSB管理的经公开确认的、专门针对BESS的强制性市场准入前产品安全认证义务——类似于沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路径或欧盟《电池法规》。实际上，塞拉利昂部署的BESS绝大多数来自捐助方资助（世界银行电力部门公用事业改革项目、非洲开发银行、UNOPS/FCDO微电网计划等）。捐助方和多边贷款方采购规格是实际技术门槛：通常要求从ILAC认可实验室取得电芯和模组的IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）和IEC 62133-2（便携式密封二次锂电芯安全要求）型式试验证书，以及电池系统的IEC 62933-5-2证据。出货前应直接向SLSB核实进口BESS电芯和模组的SLSB合格评定要求，因为塞拉利昂可能在特定产品类别下要求符合SLSB进口检验计划的合格证书。
summary.zht: 獅子山標準局（SLSB）依據《1962年獅子山標準局法》及後續立法改革設立，是負責制定和採納標準的國家機構。SLSB有權將國際標準（包括IEC標準）採納為獅子山國家標準。然而，截至本數據集日期，尚未發現SLSB管理的經公開確認的、專門針對BESS的強制性市場准入前產品安全認證義務——類似於沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路徑或歐盟《電池法規》。實際上，獅子山部署的BESS絕大多數來自捐助方資助（世界銀行電力部門公用事業改革項目、非洲開發銀行、UNOPS/FCDO微電網計劃等）。捐助方和多邊貸款方採購規格是實際技術門檻：通常要求從ILAC認可實驗室取得電芯和模組的IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）和IEC 62133-2（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯安全要求）型式試驗證書，以及電池系統的IEC 62933-5-2證據。出貨前應直接向SLSB核實進口BESS電芯和模組的SLSB合格評定要求，因為獅子山可能在特定產品類別下要求符合SLSB進口檢驗計劃的合格證書。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (donor-expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Sierra Leone project specifications)

IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — Secondary Cells and Batteries Containing Alkaline or Other Non-acid Electrolytes — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and for Batteries Made from Them (referenced in some donor procurement specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety; expected in donor-financed project specifications)
SLSB — Sierra Leone Standards Bureau Act 1962 (and amendments) — verify current import conformity assessment requirements directly with SLSB before shipment

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which establishes mandatory safety requirements for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in electrochemical energy storage. These Chinese standards are developed independently of IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 and are not harmonised with them — they are not accepted as equivalents in donor-financed project specifications in Sierra Leone. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory (in addition to any Chinese GB compliance) for cells and modules intended for donor-financed projects in Sierra Leone. SLSB may additionally require conformity evidence against an adopted national standard — verify directly.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），为100 kWh以上锂BESS电芯建立了强制安全要求。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为电化学储能中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。这些中国标准独立于IEC 62619和IEC 62133制定，与之不协调——不被塞拉利昂捐助方资助项目规格接受为等效依据。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至塞拉利昂捐助方资助项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书（除任何中国GB合规外）。SLSB可能还要求针对已采纳国家标准的合格证据——请直接核实。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），為100 kWh以上鋰BESS電芯建立了強制安全要求。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為電化學儲能中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。這些中國標準獨立於IEC 62619和IEC 62133制定，與之不協調——不被獅子山捐助方資助項目規格接受為等效依據。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至獅子山捐助方資助項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書（除任何中國GB合規外）。SLSB可能還要求針對已採納國家標準的合格證據——請直接核實。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Donor-financed BESS projects in Sierra Leone expect IEC 62619 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory as a condition of procurement approval. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in donor project technical specifications. Additionally, Sierra Leone's high-humidity coastal and equatorial environment creates a product-fitness gap: Chinese BESS datasheets and warranty terms specifying operating conditions of ≤60% RH or ≤35 °C ambient without derating may not be adequate for Freetown's conditions. Exporters and project developers should: (a) verify SLSB's current import conformity assessment requirements for lithium batteries and BESS cells before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619:2022 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for all cells and modules to be supplied to Sierra Leone donor-financed projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition and any additional test requirements referenced in the procurement specification or lender Environmental and Social Standards (ESS); (d) provide explicit tropical-environment operating data — including temperature range (typically up to 45 °C ambient), IP65 or better enclosure rating for dust and water ingress, and BMS performance at high humidity — for project owner technical review; (e) confirm system warranty terms cover tropical operating conditions without voiding cell or system warranties.
gap.zh: 关键差距：塞拉利昂捐助方资助的BESS项目要求从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证据，作为采购批准条件。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被捐助方项目技术规格接受为替代依据。此外，塞拉利昂的高湿度沿海和赤道环境带来了产品适用性差距：注明运行条件为≤60% RH或≤35°C环境（不降额）的中国BESS数据表和质保条款可能不适用于弗里敦的条件。出口商和项目开发商应：（a）出货前向SLSB核实锂电池和BESS电芯的现行进口合格评定要求；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得所有供应至塞拉利昂捐助方资助项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619:2022型式试验证书；（c）确认采购规格或贷款方环境和社会标准（ESS）中引用的IEC 62619版本及任何额外测试要求；（d）为项目业主技术审查提供明确的热带环境运行数据——包括温度范围（通常最高45°C环境温度）、防尘防水进入的IP65或更高外壳等级及高湿度下电池管理系统性能；（e）确认系统质保条款在不使电芯或系统质保失效的前提下覆盖热带运行条件。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：獅子山捐助方資助的BESS項目要求從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證據，作為採購批准條件。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被捐助方項目技術規格接受為替代依據。此外，獅子山的高濕度沿海和赤道環境帶來了產品適用性差距：注明運行條件為≤60% RH或≤35°C環境（不降額）的中國BESS數據表和質保條款可能不適用於弗里敦的條件。出口商和項目開發商應：（a）出貨前向SLSB核實鋰電池和BESS電芯的現行進口合格評定要求；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得所有供應至獅子山捐助方資助項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619:2022型式試驗證書；（c）確認採購規格或貸款方環境和社會標準（ESS）中引用的IEC 62619版本及任何額外測試要求；（d）為項目業主技術審查提供明確的熱帶環境運行數據——包括溫度範圍（通常最高45°C環境溫度）、防塵防水進入的IP65或更高外殼等級及高濕度下電池管理系統性能；（e）確認系統質保條款在不使電芯或系統質保失效的前提下覆蓋熱帶運行條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in donor-financed project practice where procurement specifications require IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 compliance; SLSB mandatory import conformity assessment obligation for BESS cells not confirmed from publicly accessible official sources — verify directly with SLSB before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety pre-market certification regulation has been identified for Sierra Leone as of the dataset date. In practice, IEC 62619 is the expected cell and module safety evidence for donor-financed BESS projects. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 alone are not sufficient for Sierra Leone donor project acceptance. Verify SLSB import conformity assessment requirements before shipment. Provide tropical-environment operating data — temperature, humidity, and dust ingress ratings — as procurement evidence. Confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, donor/lender, and any appointed conformity assessment body before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，塞拉利昂尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全市场准入前认证法规。实际上，IEC 62619是捐助方资助BESS项目的预期电芯和模组安全证据。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足塞拉利昂捐助方项目验收要求。出货前核实SLSB进口合格评定要求。提供热带环境运行数据——温度、湿度及防尘进入等级——作为采购证据。在设备采购最终确定前，向项目业主、捐助方/贷款方及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，獅子山尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全市場准入前認證法規。實際上，IEC 62619是捐助方資助BESS項目的預期電芯和模組安全證據。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足獅子山捐助方項目驗收要求。出貨前核實SLSB進口合格評定要求。提供熱帶環境運行數據——溫度、濕度及防塵進入等級——作為採購證據。在設備採購最終確定前，向項目業主、捐助方/貸款方及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
